message:
refactor(search,stats): defer dependency counting to JSON/TOON paths and generalize sort

- search.rs: extract attach_counts() helper that batch-queries
  dependency/dependent counts only when actually needed (JSON/TOON
  output), avoiding unnecessary DB queries for plain text, CSV,
  and rich table output paths
- search.rs: generalize apply_sort into apply_sort_by_issue<T>
  with a closure-based accessor, enabling sorting both Issue and
  IssueWithCounts slices without cloning; add apply_issue_sort
  convenience wrapper for Vec<Issue>
- search.rs: sort and truncate before format resolution so limit
  applies to the raw issue list rather than post-count-attachment
- stats.rs: add include_deferred=true to stats ListFilters so
  deferred issues are counted in project statistics

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
